title: oldenlandia graminifolia
intro: Oldenlandia graminifolia, also known as Chinese epilobium or grass leaf oldenlandia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia graminifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are dried and made into tea or capsules for medicinal purposes.
